_comment: Update-cadence ledger per forward-port-spec.md §1.20. Keys are Part 4 harness section names, lowercased. last_cycle_start is UTC, command-sourced at the moment the invoker supplies a cycle-start target. Seeded 2026-07-06 from each harness's most recent cycle's committed evidence (starts were unrecorded before the rule; plan/landing commit author dates stand in).
